description: Manages Google Workspace application configuration: pre-installed apps, SAML SSO applications, blocked third-party apps, and per-OU app access restrictions. SAML app details are documented as OUs and must be configured via the Admin Console.

risk_profile_effects.standard: No risk profile variation — app configuration is identical across profiles.
risk_profile_effects.elevated: No risk profile variation — app configuration is identical across profiles.
risk_profile_effects.strict: No risk profile variation — app configuration is identical across profiles.

group_ids.label: Group IDs
group_ids.client_description: Map of group names to IDs from the groups module. Used for app assignment targeting.

pre_installed_apps.label: Pre-Installed Apps
pre_installed_apps.client_description: List of Google Workspace apps to pre-install for all users (e.g., 'Google Drive', 'Google Meet'). These are available in the app launcher by default.

saml_apps.label: SAML Applications
saml_apps.client_description: Third-party applications to configure for SAML SSO. Each app needs an ACS URL, Entity ID, and optional group assignments for access control.
saml_apps.type: list(object({app_name=string, display_name=string, acs_url=string, entity_id=string, start_url=string, name_id=string, group_ids=list(string)}))

blocked_apps.label: Blocked Apps
blocked_apps.client_description: OAuth client IDs of third-party apps to block. These apps cannot access any user data in your organization.

app_access_ou_restrictions.label: App Access OU Restrictions
app_access_ou_restrictions.client_description: Map of app names to lists of OUs that can access them. Use to restrict specific apps to certain departments or teams.

outputs.app_management_ou_path: OU path for app management policy documentation
outputs.saml_app_ou_paths: Map of SAML app name to documentation OU path
outputs.blocked_app_count: Number of blocked OAuth app client IDs
